prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次分别约 6715→7089→7081→6777→7700 名，近 5 年整体呈波动后移趋势，2025 年较 2024 年后移约 923 名，基准位次约 7700 名；该校在湖北省物理类招生计划 2021–2025 年分别为 122→122→121→123→126 人，基本稳定略有扩增；2026 年计划 148 人，较 2025 年扩招约 17.5%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有显著缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学排名 2021–2026 年稳定在第 33–34 名，近年排名稳中有升，属于中坚 985 梯队；2026 年声誉评价偏负面，主要因实验室爆炸事故引发校园安全关注，可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第 23（较热），整体关注度较高；历史投档异常未见明显断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，土木工程 A+、机械工程 A-、电气工程 A-、环境科学与工程 A-、风景园林学 A-，工科实力突出，与物理类招生专业（电气信息类、工程能源类、计算机类等）高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社 会热度持续高热推荐，与重大优势工科方向契合，对高分考生吸引力强；湖北省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 39.37 万，较 2025 年（约 39.12 万）小幅增加，按近年比例估算物理类考生约 25.16 万，竞争略有加剧；重庆大学位于直辖市重庆，与湖北省同属中西部地区，地域偏好适中；该校在湖北省招生占比约 2%–3%，属正常外省招生规模，无明显地域偏好偏移。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次约 7700 名、2026 年大幅扩招约 17.5%（显著缓解竞争）、湖北省考生数小幅增加（略加剧竞争）、学校声誉偏负面（抑制部分报考热情）以及工科优势学科与热门专业高度匹配等因素，预计 2026 年物理类最低位次较 2025 年明显后移（更容易进），预测最低位次约 8557 名，区间 8057–9057 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 8057–9057 名内，建议以二档工科试验班（未来信息、高端装备与智能制造、数理基础）为主力填报，一档卓越计划/电气工程/计算机类可冲刺，三档环化健康/智慧城市/经济管理类作为保 底。位次明显优于区间下限（<8057 名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 6715→7089→7081→6777→7700, showing a fluctuating and backward trend over the past 5 years. In 2025, the ranking moved back by about 923 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of approximately 7700. The enrollment plan for this university in Hubei Province for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 was 122→122→121→123→126 students, basically stable with slight expansion. The 2026 plan is 148 students, an increase of about 17.5% compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion and will notably alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, it has been stable at 33rd–34th place, with a slight upward trend in recent years, belonging to the mid-tier 985 group. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to a laboratory explosion accident that raised campus safety concerns, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 23rd (relatively hot), with overall high attention. No obvious abnormal admission signals have been seen historically. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Civil Engineering received A+, Mechanical Engineering A-, Electrical Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, and Landscape Architecture A-, highlighting strong engineering capabilities that align well with Physics Category majors (e.g., Electrical and Information, Engineering and Energy, Computer Science, etc.).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly popular and recommended, matching Chongqing University's advantageous engineering directions and attracting high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Hubei Province is about 393,700, a slight increase from 2025 (about 391,200). Based on recent proportions, it is estimated that there are about 251,600 Physics Category candidates, leading to slightly intensified competition. Chongqing University is located in the municipality of Chongqing, which, like Hubei Province, is in the central-western region, with moderate regional preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Hubei Province is about 2%–3%, which is a normal scale for out-of-province enrollment, with no significant regional preference deviation.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of approximately 7700, the significant 17.5% enrollment expansion in 2026 (which notably alleviates competition), the slight increase in the number of candidates in Hubei Province (which slightly intensifies competition), the somewhat negative university reputation (which suppresses some application enthusiasm), and the strong alignment of advantageous engineering disciplines with popular majors, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will significantly move back (easier to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8557, with a range of 8057–9057.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Program)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer and Intelligent Software).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information)
- Engineering Experimental Class (High-End Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Physics Foundation)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Energy and Advanced Materials).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Medical-Engineering Cross and Environmental-Chemical Health)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart City and Infrastructure)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Economics and Management)
- Architecture Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 8057–9057, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes (Future Information, High-End Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing, Mathematics and Physics Foundation), with Tier 1 Excellence Program/Electrical Engineering/Computer Science as reach options, and Tier 3 Environmental-Chemical Health/Smart City/Economics and Management as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<8057), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1427 → 1553 → 1556 → 1602 → 1711, showing a continuous slight decline over the past 5 years, with a cumulative decline of about 284 places. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 1711. The enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei Province from 2021 to 2025 was 10 → 10 → 9 → 8 → 8 students, showing a gradual reduction followed by stabilization. The 2026 plan is 8 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; stable at rank 33–34 in the Soft Science rankings, belonging to the mid-tier 985 group. In 2026, the reputation is slightly negative (laboratory explosion incident), but this incident mainly affects the psychology of science and engineering applicants, with limited impact on History Category. Douyin popularity ranking is 23rd (relatively hot), with overall high attention. Chongqing University is strong in engineering, and the History Category majors (Humanities Experimental Class Law Journalism, Chinese Language and Literature, English) correspond to disciplines such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and Foreign Languages and Literatures, which have not reached A- or above, so the disciplinary advantages are not prominent.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity, Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, and foreign languages are generally wait-and-see, with differentiation in the popularity of liberal arts majors. In 2026, the total number of general college entrance exam takers in Hubei Province is approximately 393,700, a slight increase from 2025. Based on recent proportions, the estimated number of History Category examinees is about 142,100, with slightly intensified competition. Chongqing University is located in Chongqing, which is in the same central-western region as Hubei, with moderate regional preference. The History Category enrollment plan is only 8 students, a small-scale enrollment, with relatively stable competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of approximately 1711, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight increase in the number of History Category examinees in Hubei Province (slightly intensified competition), a slightly negative university reputation but with limited impact, and the differentiation in liberal arts major popularity, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly decline (slightly harder to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1731, with a range of 1471–1991.
